description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a combination of gray and green surfaces, and a mix of white and wood-textured exterior walls. The front facade is dominated by large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a prominent wooden accent section, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The right side of the building includes a covered carport with a green roof, accessible via a paved driveway and walkway. The rear and left sides are more minimal, with fewer windows and a continuation of the wood and white wall motif. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with a clear separation between the upper and lower levels. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open glazing, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, wood accents, and a covered carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, a wooden accent section, and the main entrance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the minimal window arrangement and the start of the carport roof.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the covered carport with a green roof and a visible parked car.
description_view_3: Right side view with a mix of windows and wood paneling, and the carport roof extending outward.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front windows and scattered side windows
